issues_found.description: Missing streaming support recommendation from research findings
issues_found.fix_applied: Added 'Consider streaming responses for long-form content generation to improve user experience' to DO list
issues_found.research_reference: research.json line 234 recommends streaming responses for better UX

issues_found.description: Missing rate limiting implementation using existing @upstash/ratelimit package
issues_found.location: Implementation Notes > DO section and Edge Cases section
issues_found.fix_applied: Added rate limiting recommendation to DO list, added @upstash/ratelimit to key dependencies (line 62), updated edge case #1 and added edge case #8 for user request rate limits
issues_found.research_reference: research.json lines 236, 296-300 recommend using @upstash/ratelimit for rate limiting

issues_found.description: OpenAI example code included max_tokens but Key Points section didn't explicitly mention it
issues_found.fix_applied: Added '`max_tokens` optional but recommended for cost control' to Key Points list
issues_found.research_reference: research.json line 83 and Context7 documentation show max_tokens is optional but recommended

issues_found.description: Implementation Notes DO section only mentioned max_tokens for Anthropic, not for OpenAI
issues_found.fix_applied: Updated DO item to: 'Set `max_tokens` parameter for Anthropic calls (required) and OpenAI calls (recommended for cost control)'
issues_found.research_reference: Anthropic requires max_tokens (research.json line 36), OpenAI recommends it (research.json line 83)

critique_summary: Spec was well-written overall with correct technical accuracy for all API patterns verified against Context7 documentation. Found 4 issues related to missing recommendations from research findings: streaming support and rate limiting (medium severity), and incomplete documentation of max_tokens usage for OpenAI (low severity). All issues have been fixed by adding appropriate recommendations to Implementation Notes and Edge Cases sections.
recommendations: Consider adding a code example showing how to implement @upstash/ratelimit in the Patterns to Follow section for consistency
Consider adding a streaming example pattern for long-form content generation
All technical patterns (Anthropic, OpenAI, Zod, Next.js) were validated against Context7 and match official documentation
Research findings have been fully incorporated into the spec

libraries_verified: /anthropics/anthropic-sdk-typescript - Verified max_tokens requirement and message.create() pattern
/openai/openai-node - Verified chat.completions.create() pattern and max_tokens recommendation
/colinhacks/zod - Verified safeParse() pattern and error handling
